title: SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: LAKE COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs and the school districts serving them, including support and transition services. 357 N L Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Children with special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (541) 947-3371 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-3371 Michael Benson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL HELP CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTOR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
